findings.evidence: PR line 84 proves `(h * k) • x = h • k • x := mul_smul h k x`; Mathlib exports the same theorem at `mathlib/Mathlib/Algebra/Group/Action/Defs.lean:151` as `export SemigroupAction (mul_smul)`.
findings.fix: Delete this theorem and use `mul_smul h k x` at call sites.
findings.issue: `AmbientIsotopyClass.mul_smul_apply` is exactly the existing generic action theorem `mul_smul` specialized to `(Y ≃ₜ Y)` acting on `AmbientIsotopyClass X Y`.

findings.evidence: Mathlib provides `MulAction.compHom` at `mathlib/Mathlib/Algebra/Group/Action/Hom.lean:41`; TauCeti already uses this pattern at `code/TauCeti/AlgebraicTopology/UniversalCover/Deck/Fiber.lean:127`, and the PR itself rewrites through `toHomeomorphHom_apply`/`map_one`/`map_mul` on lines 65-75.
findings.fix: Define the instance as `MulAction.compHom (AmbientIsotopyClass X M) (toHomeomorphHom (I := I) (M := M) (n := n))` and keep only the needed simp lemmas.
findings.issue: The diffeomorphism `MulAction` manually duplicates the standard pullback of the new homeomorphism action along `Diffeomorph.toHomeomorphHom`.

summary: The PR adds one theorem that is a direct duplicate of the generic `MulAction` law, and the diffeomorphism action should be transported through the existing `MulAction.compHom` API instead of restating the action laws manually.
